changeSet.author: Eugene A. Kalosha
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO public.users (id, first_name, last_name, email, password, corporate_phone, mobile_phone, enabled, expired, credentials_expired, locked, created_at, updated_at, expiration_date,
